name: RWBY: Gray Dawn(Revised)
description:
"When dawn broke, the fairy tale faded away..."

Enter a world where Vale survived the Fall, not because of Beacon or Atlas, but because seven citizens with extraordinary Semblances intervened that night. Now? Vale is a lawless disaster zone, Beacon's secrets were exposed to the public, and trust is scarcer than Dust. The city is now on the edge of collapse. Will you be the one to pull it back or tip it over?

Art by: anonamos701

Sequel: The Probe

New Revised Edition Features:

1. Multiple Faction Intros - Be just another survivor(Intro 1), a new Beacon recruit(Intro 2), an Atlas soldier(Intro 3), or even a new gang member under Neopolitan(Intro 4).

2. New Lorebook - Now has a functional lorebook to reduce the token count! The original Gray Dawn was 6k tokens. Now? 600 Tokens. Ruby is the main focus of the character description of this bot.

3. A Planned Overarching Story - Due to high interest in the original Gray Dawn bot, I've decided to write more entries into this AU. Stay tuned for sequel bots!

4. Character tweaks - Slight character tweaks that could change how you roleplay!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Notes: If it's your first time using this bot, go in blind. It's more fun to figure out how different things are in this AU than in canon as you go along. At least, I think so. But if you really want to get up to speed, read the description of the original bot. ANYPOV, but if you have some overpowered Semblance you might get mistaken as the Seventh Supernova. Tested mostly with Deepseek V3.2 and V3.3. Usable with JLLM, but expect less nuance and less chat memory.

Author's Notes: When I posted the original Gray Dawn bot, lorebooks weren't out yet and neither were multiple intro messages. Now that they are, I can work on more complex bots. I won't be deleting the original Gray Dawn bot, but I do highly recommend trying this one at least once if you've already played the original. Got another Class of '09 bot I'm about to drop soon, some of you might like it.
creator: ZelixH3lix
